query:
SELECT c.contract_no, c.total_amount, c.num_installments, c.installment_amount,
  pt.external_id, pt.paid_at, pt.amount, pt.receipt_no
FROM contracts c
JOIN payment_transactions pt ON pt.contract_external_id = c.external_id AND pt.section = c.section
WHERE c.contract_no = 'CT1024-SNI001-1086-01'
ORDER BY pt.paid_at, pt.external_id;
